Visit the Nexus Mods page
→ See crafting recipes (Details page)
Indent Block
An indent block groups related content with a visual left rule and offset.
This paragraph is indented 32px from the left edge. Content inside an indent block wraps within the reduced width.
A nested indent block adds another 32px, useful for sub-categories or step breakdowns.
Introduction
This section appears at the top of the Details page. The internal link from Overview scrolls past this section to reach Crafting Recipes below.

items: This is the first section on the Details page
The internal link target is further down
Scroll down to see where the link lands

left.label: What is this page?
left.text: This is the Details page. It has multiple sections so you can verify that internal links scroll to the correct anchor, not just the top of the page.

entries.text: Foraging & Drops
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. This section is between the intro and the crafting anchor — more content for the link to scroll past.

items: Spring Onion — found in Cindersap Forest in Spring
Daffodil — common forage item in Spring
Leek — forages in Spring, sells for 60g
Dandelion — found in Spring, used in cooking

entries.text: Forage items can be sold, gifted, or used in cooking recipes. Quality increases with Foraging skill level.
Crafting Recipes
You arrived here via the internal link from the Overview page. The anchor "crafting-anchor" targets this section specifically, scrolling past the intro and foraging sections above.
Upgrade Costs
Tool upgrades are purchased from Clint the Blacksmith. Each upgrade improves the tool's efficiency and reach.
Upgrades take 2 in-game days. Clint keeps your tool during that time.
